requirements.summary: Update WhatsApp order message formatter to use full item names, correct quantity format with spaces, no emojis, and exact section structure
acceptanceCriteria: The generated WhatsApp message starts with `New Order - Healthy Yummy Bites` and contains no emojis.
Every line item follows the format `{number} x {Full Item Name} - ₹{price}` — e.g. `5 x Paneer Wrap - ₹350`.
No item name is ever shortened or truncated (e.g. `Cold Coffee` never appears as `Cold`, `Paneer Wrap` never appears as `Paneer`).
Quantity is always written as `{number} x` with a space between the number, the `x`, and the item name — never as `5x` or `2x`.
Each item appears on its own separate line.
Customer name, phone, and full address are rendered correctly under the `Customer Details` section.
Total amount and payment method appear at the bottom of the message.

file_operations.description: Rewrite the message formatting logic to enforce the exact structure required: header `New Order - Healthy Yummy Bites` (no emoji), section labels `Customer Details` and `Order Items` (plain text), quantity format `{number} x {Full Item Name}` with spaces around the `x`, full item names pulled from menuData.ts without any truncation or abbreviation, each item on a separate line, and footer sections for total amount and payment method. Remove all emoji usage throughout the message. Ensure the function uses the complete item name from the cart data without shortening.

requirements.summary: Update CheckoutModal to use the same corrected message format for the staff confirmation template with full item names and correct quantity spacing
acceptanceCriteria: The copy-to-clipboard text in CheckoutModal matches the corrected WhatsApp message format exactly.
No truncated item names or `5x`-style quantities appear in the modal's order summary.

file_operations.description: Update the staff confirmation template rendering logic to match the corrected WhatsApp message format from whatsappOrder.ts. Ensure the copy-to-clipboard content uses the same structure: no emojis, full item names (never truncated), quantity format `{number} x {Full Item Name}` with spaces, section headers `Customer Details` and `Order Items`, and correct footer sections. The modal's order summary must mirror the WhatsApp message exactly.
